title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 492.460 - If person is minor, notice to be served upon whom
text:
492.460.  If person is minor, notice to be served upon whom. — In case the person interested be a minor, the notice shall be served on the guardian of such minor, and on such minor, if over age of fourteen years, and residing within this state.  A guardian ad litem may be appointed by the judge granting the commission, when there is no guardian.
(RSMo 1939 § 1957) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1793; 1919 § 5480; 1909 § 6423
